COC7QOL.AIGenerator.Weapon.Label: Describe your weapon
COC7QOL.AIGenerator.Weapon.Placeholder: e.g. "A worn 1920s revolver, .38 calibre, 6-shot cylinder, wood grip"
COC7QOL.AIGenerator.NPC.Label: Describe your NPC
COC7QOL.AIGenerator.NPC.Placeholder: e.g. "A nervous pharmacist in 1920s Arkham, middle-aged, hides a secret"
COC7QOL.AIGenerator.Error.EmptyWeaponDes: Please describe the weapon before generating.
COC7QOL.AIGenerator.Error.EmptyNPCDescri: Please describe the NPC before generating.
COC7QOL.AIGenerator.Error.NoAPIKey: No API key configured — set it in Module Settings → CoC7 QoL Improvements.
COC7QOL.AIGenerator.Error.WeaponCreation: CoC7 AI Generator: Failed to create item — {error}
COC7QOL.AIGenerator.Error.NPCCreationFai: CoC7 AI Generator: Failed to create NPC — {error}
COC7QOL.AIGenerator.Error.NPCCreationCan: CoC7 AI Generator: Actor creation was cancelled.
COC7QOL.AIGenerator.Error.NPCSkillsFaile: CoC7 AI Generator: NPC created but some skills failed — {error}

COC7QOL.AIGenerator.NPCDialog.Title: CoC7 AI Generator — Review NPC
COC7QOL.Settings.AIProvider.Name: AI Generator: Provider
COC7QOL.Settings.AIProvider.Hint: LLM provider used for item generation. Changing this auto-updates the endpoint and model to provider defaults.
COC7QOL.Settings.AIAPIKey.Name: AI Generator: API Key
COC7QOL.Settings.AIAPIKey.Hint: Your API key for the selected provider. Stored only in your browser (localStorage) — never sent to other players.
COC7QOL.Settings.AIEndpoint.Name: AI Generator: Endpoint URL
COC7QOL.Settings.AIEndpoint.Hint: API endpoint URL. Updated automatically when changing provider. Override for custom deployments.
COC7QOL.Settings.AIModel.Name: AI Generator: Model
COC7QOL.Settings.AIModel.Hint: Model name. Updated automatically when changing provider. Override for custom or newer models.
